description_long: This muffin features a rounded, slightly domed top covered in a dense layer of colorful sprinkles, giving it a festive and eye-catching appearance. The top surface is irregular and textured, with the sprinkles embedded in a light, possibly glazed coating. The body of the muffin is encased in a dark brown wrapper with a subtle floral print, which extends vertically and provides a clear boundary between the muffin and its base. The wrapper appears to be made of thin, patterned paper and is tightly fitted around the cylindrical lower portion of the muffin. The overall texture of the muffin top is rough and bumpy due to the abundance of sprinkles, while the wrapper is smoother but still shows some creasing and patterning. The muffin is shown isolated against a plain white background, with no visible plate or support beneath it.
description: A colorful sprinkle-topped muffin with a domed, rough-textured top and a dark brown floral-patterned paper wrapper, shown isolated on a white background.
description_view_0: The muffin is viewed from above, highlighting the multicolored sprinkle topping and the irregular, domed surface.
description_view_1: This angled side view shows both the sprinkle-covered top and the vertical, dark brown wrapper with its subtle floral pattern.
description_view_2: A direct side view emphasizes the height and cylindrical shape of the muffin, with the wrapper's texture and pattern clearly visible.
description_view_3: Another angled side view, showing the transition between the colorful, bumpy top and the smooth, patterned wrapper.
attribute_wrapper_pattern: dark brown with subtle floral print
